extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates proceedings by direction and category: for matters against the Company, I counted 2 criminal, 2 tax, and 1 statutory/regulatory proceeding, and for matters against Subsidiaries, 1 criminal, 1 tax, and 1 statutory/regulatory proceeding; all “By” rows and promoter/director personal matters were excluded. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiaries only is ₹43,529,480 + ₹10,734,530 = ₹54,264,010, or ₹5.426401 crore; the litigation table is stated in rupees, while the contingent-liabilities table is stated in ₹ million, so the source currency unit is mixed. Contingent liabilities are disclosed as of September 30, 2023; because no stated Total row appears, the listed consolidated components were summed: ₹149.64 million + ₹0.73 million + ₹500.00 million = ₹650.37 million = ₹65.037 crore. Company-wide customer concentration for the latest full fiscal year, Fiscal 2023, uses revenue from operations as the denominator: top 5 customers were 53.09% and top 10 customers were 69.04%; the conversion used is ₹10 million = ₹1 crore.
